input.title: Hotel Booking Platform
input.description: Hotel Booking Platform is a web-based enterprise platform that centralizes operational workflows, data visibility, and cross-functional reporting.

user_classes.Admin: Configures the system, manages users, and oversees permissions and settings.
user_classes.Manager: Oversees departmental workflows, approvals, KPIs, and operational reporting.
user_classes.Employee: Performs day-to-day operational tasks within assigned modules and permissions.
user_classes.User: Generic authenticated platform user with access limited by role and department.

definitions.Admin: System user with full administrative privileges.
definitions.Manager: Operational owner of a department, module, or workflow.
definitions.Employee: End user performing role-specific business operations.

constraints: Initial release will focus on the web platform only
Role-based access control is mandatory across all modules
Operational data must be auditable and retained according to policy

operating_environment.frontend: Web-based interface built with Vue.js and accessible through modern browsers.
operating_environment.backend: Service layer implemented with Laravel, MySQL for business operations.
operating_environment.deployment: Cloud-hosted environment with centralized monitoring, backups, and automated deployments.

NFR-01.title: Security and Access Control
requirements: All sensitive data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
Role-based authorization must restrict access by module and action
All authentication events and privileged actions must be logged

NFR-02.title: Performance and Scalability
requirements: Core pages and dashboards should load within acceptable enterprise SLAs
The platform must support concurrent usage across multiple departments
Background jobs and reporting workloads should not block transactional workflows

NFR-03.title: Reliability and Recoverability
requirements: Automated backups must run on a defined schedule
Critical workflows should support retry-safe processing and audit logging
Operational alerts should be generated for failures and degraded services

system_attributes.reliability: Platform should provide resilient transactional processing with backup and recovery capabilities.
system_attributes.scalability: Architecture should support horizontal scaling for APIs, background workers, and reporting services.
system_attributes.security: Authentication, authorization, encryption, and auditability must be built into every module.
system_attributes.maintainability: Codebase should remain modular, observable, and safe to extend through clear service boundaries.

out_of_scope: Native mobile applications in the first release
Large third-party marketplace or legacy ERP migrations unless explicitly scoped
Non-core experimental modules outside the platform's operational workflows

FR-01.title: Hotel Search and Filters
requirements: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests
Filter by price range, star rating, amenities
Sort by price, rating, distance from center
Map view showing hotel locations

FR-02.title: Room Reservation
requirements: View room types with photos, amenities, and prices
Select room and complete booking
System checks room availability in real-time
Booking confirmation sent via email

FR-03.title: Guest Profile and Preferences
requirements: Store guest preferences for room type and amenities
Save frequent guest details for faster booking
Loyalty points system for repeat customers
View booking history

FR-04.title: Payment and Invoice
requirements: Pay via credit card, PayPal, or bank transfer
Partial payment with deposit option
Generate detailed invoice with tax breakdown
Automated refund on cancellation within policy

FR-05.title: Booking Cancellation and Modification
requirements: Cancel booking per cancellation policy
Modify dates or room type if available
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in
Cancellation fees apply within 48 hours

FR-06.title: Hotel Owner Property Management
requirements: Add property with details, photos, and room types
Set pricing per room type with seasonal rates
Manage room inventory and availability calendar
View booking reports and revenue

FR-07.title: Guest Review System
requirements: Guests can rate hotel after checkout
Rate cleanliness, service, location, value separately
Write text review with optional photos
Hotel can respond to reviews

FR-08.title: Check-in and Check-out
requirements: Online check-in available 24 hours before arrival
Generate digital room key via app
Express check-out with email receipt
Late check-out request option

FR-01.title: Plan Hotel Search and Filters Workflow and Contracts
FR-01.description: Review the SRS requirement bullets for hotel search and filters and break them into executable API, UI, data, security, and reporting subtasks. Define the workflow states, user roles, field-level validations, request/response contracts, and failure cases before implementation starts. Use these requirement drivers as the baseline: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests; Filter by price range, star rating, amenities; Sort by price, rating, distance from center.
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end workflow for hotel search and filters is documented from trigger to completion
Validation rules, role restrictions, and error scenarios for hotel search and filters are explicitly defined
Implementation subtasks for hotel search and filters can be picked up independently by engineering

FR-01.title: Implement Hotel Search and Filters Backend Services
FR-01.description: Build the backend services for hotel search and filters on Vue.js, Laravel, MySQL. Create route handlers or service endpoints, model the core business operations, enforce validation and authorization rules, persist workflow state changes, and add structured error handling and audit logging. Make sure the implementation covers these behaviors: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests; Filter by price range, star rating, amenities; Sort by price, rating, distance from center.
acceptance_criteria: Core hotel search and filters business rules are implemented for Hotel Booking Platform
Validation, authorization, and error handling are covered for hotel search and filters
API/service behavior for hotel search and filters is testable and documented for integration

FR-01.title: Implement Hotel Search and Filters Frontend Flow
FR-01.description: Build the frontend flow for hotel search and filters with the exact forms, tables, filters, wizards, status indicators, and action buttons required by the SRS. Connect the UI to the backend contract, handle optimistic updates or refresh flows where needed, and provide user-facing validation, permissions feedback, loading states, and recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: The hotel search and filters user flow is accessible and responsive across supported browsers
Forms, filters, tables, and feedback states for hotel search and filters behave correctly
The hotel search and filters UI is fully integrated with backend APIs and handles loading and error states

FR-01.title: Write Hotel Search and Filters Automated and End-to-End Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for hotel search and filters. Cover valid flows, invalid inputs, permission failures, state transitions, data integrity checks, and regression-prone edge cases pulled from the SRS. Add fixtures or mocks that make the feature verifiable in CI and local development.
acceptance_criteria: Happy path and failure cases for hotel search and filters are covered by automated tests
Permission checks and validation rules for hotel search and filters are verified
Regression coverage exists for the most critical hotel search and filters scenarios

FR-04.description: Apply security controls to payment and invoice. Implement role checks, field-level protections, data masking where appropriate, secure defaults, audit trails, and abuse-prevention rules. Verify that sensitive operations are guarded both in the API layer and in the UI visibility rules.
acceptance_criteria: Access control rules for payment and invoice are enforced consistently across API and UI layers
Sensitive operations and data paths in payment and invoice are audited and protected against misuse
